kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC-API-03 Execute Fund Transfer Via API

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/transfer?fromAccountId=13344&toAccountId=13455&amount=150 path_url=/parabank/services/bank/transfer?fromAccountId=13344&toAccountId=13455&amount=150 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None

POST Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/transfer?fromAccountId=13344&toAccountId=13455&amount=150 status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Mon, 22 Jun 2026 18:15:23 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0fd3cf36eb2327c-DEL'} body=Successfully transferred $150 from account #13344 to account #13455

C:\Users\mridu\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'parabank.parasoft.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
